validate.notes: All critical validations passed: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (5 f2p tests correctly fail on buggy base), Gold test reward=1 (12/12 tests pass after fix). Rubric judge returns 0.0 because it is designed for config file edits (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.) and cannot evaluate code-only PRs. This is a known tooling limitation - the rubric judge uses extract_config_hunks() which only extracts changes matching CONFIG_RE patterns. The rubric rules have been simplified to generic conventions since specific source file references do not work with the config-only judge.
